releaseNotes:
1.0.2: Series catalog loading and JSON parsing hardened; update check opens GitHub releases (APK still via downloader code 7948289).
Built-in player: stream format, decoder/buffer/audio/surface options in Settings.
Movies & Series: clearer cyan focus ring on posters and categories.

Earlier: Live TV info card with controls; smoother back from fullscreen; TV Guide logo sizing; Sports Report league matching and live open; auto-tagging LIVE badges.
